creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
I love, and very much miss send-pr. Given it was written
with gnats in mind. It's clear it has no place [currently]
with devel/bugzilla. This is an attempt to rectify that issue.
By re-writing send-pr against bugzilla. I have only just started.
I'm loading up a copy of devel/bugzilla now, to work against.
But feel it prudent to get feedback on how this would all be
best implemented, where those actually running bugzilla
at bugs.freebsd.org, are concerned.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
